original_query: with ss_items as  (select i_item_id item_id        ,c_birth_year birth_year         ,sum(ss_ext_sales_price) ss_item_rev  from store_sales      ,item      ,date_dim      ,customer  where ss_item_sk = i_item_sk    and d_date in (select d_date                   from date_dim                   where d_month_seq = (select d_month_seq                                       from date_dim                                       where d_date = '2001-04-16'))    and ss_sold_date_sk   = d_date_sk    and ss_list_price between 94 and 123    and i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 and 100    and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk    and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953 group by i_item_id, c_birth_year),  cs_items as  (select i_item_id item_id         ,c_birth_year birth_year         ,sum(cs_ext_sales_price) cs_item_rev   from catalog_sales       ,item       ,date_dim       ,customer  where cs_item_sk = i_item_sk   and  d_date in (select d_date                   from date_dim                   where d_month_seq = (select d_month_seq                                       from date_dim                                       where d_date = '2001-04-16'))   and  cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk   and  cs_list_price between 94 and 123   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 and 100   and cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk   and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953 group by i_item_id, c_birth_year),  ws_items as  (select i_item_id item_id       ,c_birth_year birth_year         ,sum(ws_ext_sales_price) ws_item_rev   from web_sales       ,item       ,date_dim       ,customer  where ws_item_sk = i_item_sk   and  d_date in (select d_date                   from date_dim                   where d_month_seq = (select d_month_seq                                      from date_dim                                      where d_date = '2001-04-16'))   and ws_sold_date_sk   = d_date_sk   and ws_list_price between 94 and 123   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 and 100   and ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk   and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953 group by i_item_id, c_birth_year)   select  ss_items.item_id, ss_items.birth_year        ,ss_item_rev        ,ss_item_rev/((ss_item_rev+cs_item_rev+ws_item_rev)/3) * 100 ss_dev        ,cs_item_rev        ,cs_item_rev/((ss_item_rev+cs_item_rev+ws_item_rev)/3) * 100 cs_dev        ,ws_item_rev        ,ws_item_rev/((ss_item_rev+cs_item_rev+ws_item_rev)/3) * 100 ws_dev        ,(ss_item_rev+cs_item_rev+ws_item_rev)/3 average  from ss_items,cs_items,ws_items  where ss_items.item_id=cs_items.item_id    and ss_items.item_id=ws_items.item_id    and ss_items.birth_year = cs_items.birth_year    and ss_items.birth_year = ws_items.birth_year    and ss_item_rev between 0.9 * cs_item_rev and 1.1 * cs_item_rev    and ss_item_rev between 0.9 * ws_item_rev and 1.1 * ws_item_rev    and cs_item_rev between 0.9 * ss_item_rev and 1.1 * ss_item_rev    and cs_item_rev between 0.9 * ws_item_rev and 1.1 * ws_item_rev    and ws_item_rev between 0.9 * ss_item_rev and 1.1 * ss_item_rev    and ws_item_rev between 0.9 * cs_item_rev and 1.1 * cs_item_rev  order by item_id, birth_year          ,ss_item_rev  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH target_month AS (
  SELECT d_month_seq
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_date = '2001-04-16'
),
target_dates AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_month_seq = (SELECT d_month_seq FROM target_month)
),
sales_data AS (
  SELECT 
    'store' AS channel,
    i.i_item_id AS item_id,
    c.c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN target_dates td ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = td.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
  WHERE ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123
    AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 AND 100
    AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
  GROUP BY i.i_item_id, c.c_birth_year
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    'catalog' AS channel,
    i.i_item_id AS item_id,
    c.c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(cs.cs_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN target_dates td ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = td.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer c ON cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
  WHERE cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123
    AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 AND 100
    AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
  GROUP BY i.i_item_id, c.c_birth_year
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    'web' AS channel,
    i.i_item_id AS item_id,
    c.c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM web_sales ws
  JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN target_dates td ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = td.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer c ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
  WHERE ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123
    AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 AND 100
    AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
  GROUP BY i.i_item_id, c.c_birth_year
),
pivoted_data AS (
  SELECT
    item_id,
    birth_year,
    MAX(CASE WHEN channel = 'store' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END) AS ss_item_rev,
    MAX(CASE WHEN channel = 'catalog' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END) AS cs_item_rev,
    MAX(CASE WHEN channel = 'web' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END) AS ws_item_rev
  FROM sales_data
  GROUP BY item_id, birth_year
),
final_data AS (
  SELECT
    item_id,
    birth_year,
    ss_item_rev,
    cs_item_rev,
    ws_item_rev,
    (ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev)/3 AS average
  FROM pivoted_data
  WHERE ss_item_rev > 0 AND cs_item_rev > 0 AND ws_item_rev > 0
    AND ss_item_rev BETWEEN 0.9 * cs_item_rev AND 1.1 * cs_item_rev
    AND ss_item_rev BETWEEN 0.9 * ws_item_rev AND 1.1 * ws_item_rev
    AND cs_item_rev BETWEEN 0.9 * ws_item_rev AND 1.1 * ws_item_rev
)
SELECT
  item_id,
  birth_year,
  ss_item_rev,
  ss_item_rev/average * 100 AS ss_dev,
  cs_item_rev,
  cs_item_rev/average * 100 AS cs_dev,
  ws_item_rev,
  ws_item_rev/average * 100 AS ws_dev,
  average
FROM final_data
ORDER BY item_id, birth_year, ss_item_rev
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Extract the repeated subquery for d_month_seq into a common CTE (target_date) to avoid redundant computations
Create a target_dates CTE to compute the set of dates with the target month sequence once, rather than repeating the calculation in each sales CTE
Simplified the WHERE clause by removing redundant conditions (reduced from 6 to 3 revenue comparison conditions)
